title: Prestwick Airport: John Swinney seeking UK Government meeting over US military use of airport

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content:
Prestwick Airport: John Swinney seeking UK Government meeting over US military use of airport.

Three US military planes stopped off at Prestwick Airport on their way to the Middle East.
